prompt_config.theme: Late Cretaceous Period - Premium Time Travel Safari Experience
prompt_config.photography_style: Aspirational travel advertising, adventure tourism, vertical mobile-optimized

main_prompt: Dynamic travel agency promotional content for premium Cretaceous safari, 9:16 vertical format for Stories and Reels, luxury tourism campaign style, excited tourists in modern safari observation vehicle experiencing thrilling dinosaur encounter from safe transparent dome, towering Tyrannosaurus Rex filling vertical frame dramatically while tourists photograph safely from below, or elevated observation platform with families watching prehistoric wildlife, spectacular golden hour lighting creating magical atmosphere, lush fern-covered landscape with ancient conifers emphasizing vertical depth, vibrant appealing colors, sense of wonder excitement and safety combined, luxury adventure tourism aesthetic, scientifically accurate dinosaurs presented as accessible vacation destination, immersive vertical storytelling showing both wildlife spectacle and comfortable tourist experience, aspirational lifestyle imagery optimized for mobile viewing, 8K detailed, travel marketing making viewers want to book immediately, perfect for Stories and Reels engagement

composition_notes.stories_reels_optimization: Vertical 9:16 travel marketing format for immersive mobile viewing, emphasizes towering dinosaurs and vertical adventure while showing tourist safety and comfort
composition_notes.vertical_storytelling: Composition flows from ground-level tourist perspective upward to impressive dinosaurs, creating aspirational first-person experience
framing_options: Option 1: Ground-level tourist POV looking up at towering T-Rex from safe vehicle, dramatic vertical scale showing adventure, vehicle dome visible in foreground
Option 2: Vertical platform view showing tourists at mid-level watching dinosaurs below and pterosaurs above, multi-level prehistoric experience
Option 3: Tourist in foreground filming with phone in vertical format, dinosaur spectacular in background, relatable Stories/Reels moment
Option 4: Vertical slice showing complete safari experience - vehicle at bottom, tourists in middle, dinosaurs and sky above
composition_notes.mobile_engagement: Optimized for vertical mobile viewing with swipe-up appeal, creates desire to learn more and book, perfect for Stories ads
composition_notes.safe_zones: Key elements positioned to avoid Stories UI, maintaining commercial impact and call-to-action space

travel_agency_vertical.mobile_marketing: Premium time travel safari optimized for Stories/Reels/TikTok format, vertical video-style promotional imagery for social media generation
travel_agency_vertical.target_audience: Mobile-first travelers, Stories viewers, adventure seekers, families, luxury experience enthusiasts scrolling social media
travel_agency_vertical.vertical_selling_points: Immersive first-person perspective, towering impressive dinosaurs, safe comfortable experience, shareable vertical content, ultimate photo/video opportunity
travel_agency_vertical.call_to_action: Swipe up to book, link in bio, immediate booking appeal through compelling vertical imagery

tourist_experience_vertical.safari_vehicles_vertical: Modern observation vehicles with transparent domes viewed from inside or showing excited tourists photographing dinosaurs, vertical composition emphasizing protected safe viewing while dinosaurs tower above
tourist_experience_vertical.viewing_platforms_vertical: Elevated platforms shown in vertical frame with tourists at mid-level, dinosaurs below or at eye level, pterosaurs above, creating multi-layer vertical safari experience
tourist_experience_vertical.tourist_authenticity: Diverse tourists in modern safari casual wear (khaki, earth tones, sun hats, cameras) showing genuine excitement, taking vertical photos/videos themselves, creating relatable Stories moment
tourist_experience_vertical.professional_guides: Expert guides in uniform visible explaining and ensuring safety, professional operation clear, showing this is organized premium experience
tourist_experience_vertical.vertical_safety: Security elements visible throughout vertical frame - reinforced viewing areas, protective domes, railings - showing adventure is thrilling but completely safe

dinosaur_vertical_spectacle.tyrannosaurus_rex_towering: T-Rex emphasized in vertical composition filling frame from ground upward, detailed realistic scaly skin, lips covering teeth, brown-grey with display colors, towering impressively while tourists safely observe from below, creating dramatic vertical scale and power
dinosaur_vertical_spectacle.triceratops_accessible: Triceratops herds at comfortable viewing level, impressive three horns and massive frills, peaceful grazing showing they're safe herbivores, families can observe comfortably, positioned in vertical frame for perfect viewing
dinosaur_vertical_spectacle.quetzalcoatlus_aerial: Giant pterosaurs perfect for vertical composition - shown flying through upper portion of frame or standing showing full giraffe-height, impressive wingspan, unique aerial prehistoric experience in vertical space
dinosaur_vertical_spectacle.edmontosaurus_herds: Large peaceful herds creating impressive group spectacle in mid-ground, guaranteed sightings, excellent for vertical video panning
dinosaur_vertical_spectacle.vertical_behavior: Dinosaurs shown in exciting natural behaviors that work well vertically - T-Rex roaring upward, pterosaurs diving, herds moving through vertical landscape

prehistoric_paradise_vertical.vertical_landscape: Lush beautiful prehistoric environment composed vertically - fern-covered ground in foreground, ancient towering conifers reaching up frame, sky at top, creating depth layers
prehistoric_paradise_vertical.fern_prairies_foreground: Beautiful fern-covered plains (no grass, scientifically accurate) in sharp foreground detail, exotic green ground cover looking inviting
prehistoric_paradise_vertical.ancient_forests_vertical: Tall ancient Araucaria conifers and pines emphasizing vertical composition naturally, Cycads and Magnolias adding variety, forest creating height and majesty
prehistoric_paradise_vertical.scenic_elements: Water features, dramatic skies, beautiful horizons composed for vertical viewing, creating aspirational destination beauty
prehistoric_paradise_vertical.welcoming_atmosphere: Environment looks beautiful and inviting not threatening, comfortable subtropical climate, perfect vacation conditions

golden_hour_vertical.vertical_lighting: Beautiful warm golden hour light flowing through vertical composition, warm amber glow from foreground to sky, creating magical atmosphere
golden_hour_vertical.dramatic_vertical_shadows: Long shadows emphasizing vertical depth and dinosaur scale, dramatic but inviting lighting
golden_hour_vertical.sky_gradient: Beautiful peachy-pink and golden sky in upper portion of vertical frame, aspirational vacation sunset/sunrise
golden_hour_vertical.perfect_conditions: Clear visibility throughout vertical frame, comfortable lighting, perfect viewing weather, ideal photo opportunity moment

stories_colors.vibrant_mobile: Rich vibrant but natural colors optimized for mobile screens and Stories viewing, immediate visual impact while scrolling
stories_colors.vertical_harmony: Color palette flowing harmoniously through vertical composition - earthy foreground, lush green middle, beautiful sky top
stories_colors.engagement_colors: Colors that capture attention in fast-scrolling Stories and Reels feeds while maintaining professional quality and natural authenticity

vertical_marketing_mood.immersive_excitement: Vertical format creates immersive first-person feeling - viewer feels like they're actually there experiencing safari
vertical_marketing_mood.safe_adventure: Despite dramatic towering dinosaurs, overall mood is confident and secure, professional operation visible
vertical_marketing_mood.shareable_moment: Composition creates desire to share and post, relatable vertical content, Instagram/TikTok-worthy experience
vertical_marketing_mood.booking_urgency: Immediate desire to book created by compelling vertical imagery showing ultimate bucket-list experience
vertical_marketing_mood.family_appeal: Can show families enjoying together, suitable for various ages, bonding adventure

negative_prompt: scary threatening atmosphere, tourists in danger, attacking dinosaurs, dark ominous horror aesthetic, panic fear, damaged vehicles, uncomfortable primitive conditions, budget tourism, circus presentation, anachronistic Jurassic species, cartoon style, unrealistic colors, poor quality, blurry, aggressive marketing, cheesy tourist trap, fake manipulated, horizontal composition, landscape orientation

stories_reels_tips: Vertical composition emphasizes dinosaur height naturally
Colors optimized for mobile Stories viewing
Perfect for travel agency Stories ads with swipe-up
Position key elements within safe zones for UI
Test on mobile for optimal vertical impact
